{{CargoRelic
|name=The Cambridge Lover's Knot Tiara
|class_id=21251
|rank=AAA
|affct=FAME
|source=
|description=The story behind the tiara originates from a romantic tale. It was initially custom-made by King Ludwig I's son, who later became King Otto of Greece, for his wife Amalia. Unfortunately, the king soon developed a mental illness, causing Queen Amalia to weep daily, thus giving the tiara the name Pearl Tears, filled with a sense of tragedy. Later, Queen Mary of the United Kingdom, based on her grandmother the Duchess of Cambridge's tiara, replicatedThis tiara. It was then passed onto Princess Diana.
|fame=75
|art=43
|fth=33
|civ=42
|tech=50
|ss1=Snail ATK +10<br>Snail DEF +10
|ss2=Snail ATK +20<br>Snail DEF +20
|ss3=Snail ATK +30<br>Snail DEF +30
|ss4=Snail ATK +50<br>Snail DEF +50
|ss5=Snail ATK +70<br>Snail DEF +70
|ss7=Snail ATK +70<br>Snail DEF +70<br>Snail HP +1000 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Skill skill II.png|50px]]??? (Coming soon)
|skill2=[[File:Skill skill II.png|50px]]??? (Coming soon)
}}
